template: A square-based open-top box is made from {area} cm² of material. Find the side length of the base that maximizes volume.

contexts.narrative: A manufacturer has {area} cm² of sheet metal to form an open-top box with a square base.
A farmer has {area} cm² of galvanized steel to build an open-top grain bin with a square base.

backwards_prompt: An optimization problem yields a square-based open-top box with base side x = √(A/3) from A cm² of material. Reconstruct the problem setup.

break_errors.explanation: Critical point found but not verified as maximum.
Set up V = x²h but forgot to eliminate h using the surface area constraint.
